steps.title: Check the fixed values
steps.content: The function values $f(0)=4$, $f(8)=0$, and $f(20)=0$ are given as facts. A statement cannot be true if it directly contradicts one of them.

steps.title: Find the contradiction
steps.content: The statement $f(20)<0$ contradicts the given value $f(20)=0$, because $0$ is not less than $0$. The answer is A.
